wikitext:
{{Relic Infobox|Whispering Earring|2}}{{Keyword Infobox|Energy|2}}
{{R|Whispering Earring||2}} is an {{QueryLink|Relics|rarity:Ancient|Ancient|2}} {{2|Relics|Relic}}. It grants 1 additional {{Icon|CE|2}} per turn, but the first turn of each combat is played by ''{{KW|Vakuu||2}}'' instead of the player. {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays cards in hand from left to right, until all cards and/or {{KW|Energy||2}}/{{KW|Star|Stars|2}} are depleted ''or'' until he has played 13 cards. After this, the player regains control of the turn.

== Obtaining Whispering Earring ==
At the start of {{2|Acts#Act 3|Act 3}}, {{R|Whispering Earring||2}} can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.

===Spawn Restrictions===
*Because {{R|Whispering Earring||2}} shares a relic pool with {{R|Blood-Soaked Rose||2}} and {{R|Fiddle||2}}, only 1 of the 3 can be offered by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.
== Interactions ==
{{KW|Vakuu||2}} will play a maximum of ''13 cards'' during the first turn, after which the player regains control and can continue playing as normal.
===Order===
*{{KW|Vakuu||2}} will always prefer the left-most or ''first'' option when making ''choices''. For example:
**If there are multiple enemies, {{KW|Vakuu||2}} will target the left-most enemy each time.
**If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays {{C|Burning Pact||2}}, he will {{KW|Exhaust||2}} the left-most card in hand.
**If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays {{C|Headbutt||2}}, he will put the first card in the Discard Pile (i.e. the first card that was put there) on top of the Draw Pile.
** Effects that select cards in the Draw Pile (such as {{C|CHARGE!!||2}}, {{C|Cleanse||2}}, or {{C|Secret Technique||2}}) are obfuscated, as the player cannot observe the Draw Pile's order when those cards are played.
*If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays a card that can choose any number of cards in a hand (such as {{C|GUARDS!!!||2}}), he will select ''all'' cards available.
*If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} reaches a card that cannot be played due to its cost or conditions (such as {{C|Grand Finale||2}}), he will attempt to play the ''next'' available card in hand.
**If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} acquires the resources or conditions necessary to play a card previously skipped, he will play that card.
* {{KW|Innate||2}} cards are always the first cards drawn, so {{KW|Vakuu||2}} will always attempt to play them before any others.
* In {{2|Multiplayer}}, no player can take any action until {{KW|Vakuu||2}} is finished playing cards.

=== Synergies ===
====Relics====
*{{R|Gambling Chip||2}} allows the player to selectively discard cards before the hand is played by {{KW|Vakuu||2}}, thus manipulating the left-to-right presentation of the hand and in turn cards played.
**While cards can be selected and deselected with {{R|Gambling Chip||2}} to rearrange their order, this does not result in a different sequence in play for {{KW|Vakuu||2}}.
***As an example, if an opening hand includes a series of {{C|Strike (Ironclad)|Strikes|2}} followed by a {{C|Bash||2}} at the right-most end, and the cards are "reordered" via {{R|Gambling Chip||2}} so that {{C|Bash||2}} appears first on the left-most end, {{KW|Vakuu||2}} will ''not'' play {{C|Bash||2}} first, and instead will play the cards as they were originally drawn.
*Cards chosen via {{R|Toolbox||2}} appear on the left-most side of the player's Hand, which allows the player to dictate {{KW|Vakuu||2}}'s first-played card.
====Potions====
*[[Slay the Spire 2:Potions List|Potions]] that provide {{KW|Energy||2}} (such as {{P|Energy Potion||2}}, {{P|Cure All||2}}, {{P|Radiant Tincture||2}}, or even {{P|Star Potion||2}}) can allow the player to play additional cards on the opening turn once {{KW|Vakuu|Vakuu's|2}} plays are done.

===Neutral===
*If the player has the {{R|Unceasing Top||2}} and {{KW|Vakuu||2}} depletes the opening hand's cards, the {{R|Unceasing Top||2}} will draw more cards for him to play.
* Cards are drawn and created from left to right (i.e., new cards are added to the hand to the right of existing cards in hand). This makes it very unlikely for {{KW|Vakuu||2}} to play newly-drawn or created cards unless he can gain extra {{Icon|CE|2}}.

===Anti-Synergies===
*If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays {{C|Void Form||2}}, the turn will end regardless of whether additional cards can be played.
*Certain cards (such as {{C|Fiend Fire||2}}, {{C|Shadow Step||2}}, or {{C|Purity||2}}) may deplete the opening hand before all {{KW|Energy||2}} has been used.
**If {{KW|Vakuu||2}} plays {{C|Shadow Step||2}} and the player has the {{R|History Course||2}} is present, the player may become stuck in a soft-lock in which the {{R|History Course||2}} copies {{C|Shadow Step||2}} at the start of every turn, discarding all cards in hand.
* {{C|Panic Button||2}} and {{C|The Gambit||2}} are extremely dangerous to have with the {{R|Whispering Earring||2}}. They cost 0 {{Icon|CE|2}} and have no restrictions, so {{KW|Vakuu||2}} will play them immediately.

== Trivia ==
*{{R|Whispering Earring||2}} is likely a reference to ''[https://croissanthology.com/earring "Clarity didn't work, trying mysterianism (The Whispering Earring)"]'' by Scott Alexander.
== Update History ==
*'''Early Access v0.104.0'''
**Fixed Vakuu's Whispering Earring not correctly playing Stardust card
**Unceasing Top relic now triggers properly when Vakuu's Whispering Earring relic plays the last card in your hand <!-- Not sure what to make of this; seems to work as intended as of v0.103.2? -->
*'''Early Access v0.103.2'''
**BETA changes incorporated into main branch.
* '''Early Access v0.102.0'''
**Effects that occur before your turn now interact correctly with Vakuu's Whispering Earring relic
**Fixed Vakuu's Whispering Earring relic continuing to play cards after Void Form power ended the turn
* '''Early Access v0.98'''
** Added Whispering Earring to the game.
